# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance improvements** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 and ships allocation-free hot-path optimizations. This release bumps the bundled Skia engine to m151 and delivers a series of zero-allocation performance fixes: pooled UTF-8 encoding in HarfBuzz, Span-based glyph result reads, and allocation-free tag parsing. SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> parsing overloads and a WASM build fix lands for Blazor users.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))
- **WASM build fix for SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition** — A Skia submodule bump removes a duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM preprocessor definition that caused WASM/Blazor build failures. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, eliminating string allocations in hot-path color parsing scenarios. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, making the type safer to use without unsafe contexts. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **HarfBuzzSharp Buffer.AddUtf8 made allocation-free** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder, eliminating the per-call byte[] allocation on the hot shaping path. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376))
- **HarfBuzzSharp Tag.Parse allocation removed** — HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] array on every call, reducing GC pressure during font feature parsing. ([#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408))
- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — SKShaper now reads glyph position and ID results via zero-copy Span access instead of array copies, reducing allocations per shaping call. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **SKFourByteTag.Parse allocation removed** — SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] array per call, matching the HarfBuzz Tag fix for consistency. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Eliminates per-call allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 and HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse, reducing GC pressure on the hot text-shaping path.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151, fixed the WASM build redefinition, and merged the first set of upstream m151 cherry-picks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
